patches.find: Two are claimed as confirmed; four are pending.
patches.replace: Two are claimed as confirmed; three are pending; one (NMP drift rate) self-reports as failing by its own 39.9% error metric.
patches.rationale: Opening paragraph says "four are pending" but the table shows 2 Confirmed + 3 Pending + 1 Failing (Test 6 NMP). The dome itself reports Test 6 as having 39.9% error, exceeding its 30% falsification threshold.
